chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ أَنْ تُطْعَمَ الْحُبْلَى وَ النُّفَسَاءُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 12 – What is recommended to feed the pregnant and (during) bleeding following childbirth

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/39)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/39)
text: فِي الْمَرْأَةِ الْحَامِلِ تَأْكُلُ السَّفَرْجَلَ فَإِنَّ الْوَلَدَ يَكُونُ أَطْيَبَ رِيحاً وَ أَصْفَى لَوْناً .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from salma Bin Al Khattab, from Usman Bin Abdul Rahman, from Shurhabeel Bin Muslim,
‘He<sup>asws</sup> said regarding the pregnant woman: ‘She should eat the quince, so the child would happen to be of pleasant aroma, and clear colour’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Salmah ibn al-Khattab from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Abd al- Rahman from Sharahbil ibn Muslim who has said the following: “He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘A pregnant woman should eat quince because the child grows up of fine smell and clear color.’”
